sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23824" key="dekadou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεκᾰδ-οῦχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n23824.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one of the ten,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Harp.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
